input: Replace react-beautiful-dnd with @atlaskit/pragmatic-drag-and-drop for channel bookmarks. Add overflow detection, cross-container DnD, keyboard reorder, and a11y.

4-test.notes: Playwright exploratory testing done. No unit/E2E test files written.

5-quality.notes: tsc, eslint, stylelint pass. i18n extracted. Removed unused @atlaskit/pragmatic-drag-and-drop-live-region.

6-review.notes: PR review feedback from hmhealey, jgheithcock, asaadmahmood fully addressed.

commits: cd26e479a5 refactor(channel_bookmarks): address PR #35118 review feedback
8a167d498b refactor(menu): add forwardRef to Menu.Item, remove sentinel ref hack

1cb39e4420 style(channel_bookmarks): grabbing cursor during bookmark drag
d7bf5e7191 style(channel_bookmarks): refine focus and reorder indicators
0af9c71560 feat(channel_bookmarks): keyboard reorder across bar and overflow
c27a5cfd4b fix(channel_bookmarks): block conflicting keys during keyboard reorder
d2686736de fix(channel_bookmarks): overflow menu alignment and focus management
9731df9844 docs: update review-refine with latest changes
f6cdf75e26 fix(menu): auto-close menu on controlled→uncontrolled transition
2d8f95e0ad fix(channel_bookmarks): dot menu button focusable after Escape

deferred: BookmarkMeasureItem replacement — IntersectionObserver or measure real items

Anchor/links semantic redesign in overflow (consider base-ui)
useTextOverflow callback ref — concluded not worth pursuing (lifecycle mismatch)
